## 📊 What You're Building

**12 Categories (Hierarchical Structure):**
```
📂 Fresh Mushrooms (main)
   ├── Fresh Shiitake (sub)
   ├── Fresh Oyster (sub)
   ├── Fresh Button (sub)
   └── Fresh Enoki (sub)

📂 Dried Mushrooms (main)
   └── Dried Shiitake (sub)

📂 Specialty Mushrooms (main)
   └── King Oyster (sub)

📂 Organic Collection (main)
📂 Products (main)
📂 Bundles (main)
```

**30 Products:**
- ⭐ 10 featured (homepage carousel)
- 📦 20 regular (shop page)
- 🏷️ 13 with promotions (discounts!)
- 📋 All with SKU codes
- 📊 All with stock quantities
- ⚖️ All with weights/units
- 🔗 All connected to categories
- 🖼️ **NO images yet** (you add later!)

**Expected Result:**
- ✅ Homepage shows 10 products in carousel
- ✅ Shop page shows all 30 products
- ✅ Categories filter works
- ✅ Product detail pages work
- ✅ Add to cart works
- ⚠️ Products have no images yet (placeholders show)
- 🖼️ You add images later at your own pace

## 🚀 Quick Start (Right Now!)

**Step 1: Choose Your Path** (1 minute)
- Option 1: Follow checklist → Open `QUICK_CHECKLIST.md`
- Option 2: Read guide first → Open `START_HERE_KENNETH.md`
- Option 3: Jump in → Open `COPY_PASTE_PRODUCTS_NO_IMAGES.md`

**Step 2: Open Sanity Studio** (1 minute)
- Go to: https://mash-ecommerce.sanity.studio
- Log in with your credentials

**Step 3: Create Categories** (10 minutes)
- Copy/paste 6 main categories
- Copy/paste 6 subcategories
- **SKIP images** - leave blank!

**Step 4: Add Featured Products** (15 minutes)
- Copy/paste 10 featured products
- Check "Featured Product" box
- **SKIP images** - leave blank!

**Step 5: Add Regular Products** (15 minutes)
- Copy/paste 20 regular products
- Don't check "Featured Product"
- **SKIP images** - leave blank!

**Step 6: Test!** (3 minutes)
- Open: http://localhost:3000/
- Homepage shows products! 🎉
- Shop page works! 🎉

**Total Time:** 30-45 minutes

---

## 🖼️ Adding Images Later (Optional)

**When you have product images:**

1. Open Sanity Studio
2. Click "Products" → Select product
3. Click "Product Image" field
4. Upload image
5. Click "Publish"
6. Repeat for each product

**Where to Get Images:**
- **Unsplash:** https://unsplash.com/s/photos/mushroom
- **Pexels:** https://www.pexels.com/search/mushroom/
- **Pixabay:** https://pixabay.com/images/search/mushroom/
- **Your own photos!**

**Time Needed:** 60-90 minutes for all 30 products

## ❓ Troubleshooting

### "Homepage still shows 'No featured products available yet'"
**Solution:**
1. Make sure at least 8 products have "Featured Product" checked ✅
2. Refresh page (Ctrl + F5)
3. Check browser console for errors (F12)

### "Category dropdown is empty when adding products"
**Solution:**
1. Create categories first (Step 1 & 2)
2. Refresh Sanity Studio page
3. Categories should appear in dropdown now

### "Can't publish product - says Image is required"
**Solution:**
- Your Sanity schema might require images
- See guide section: "⚠️ IMPORTANT: Image Field Configuration"
- Follow Option A (make images optional) OR Option B (use placeholder)

### "Subcategory not connecting to parent category"
**Solution:**
1. Make sure parent category is published first
2. Select parent from "Parent Category" dropdown
3. If dropdown empty, create main categories first

### "Products not showing on shop page"
**Solution:**
1. Make sure products are published (not just saved as draft)
2. Check "Available for Purchase" is checked ✅
3. Refresh browser (Ctrl + F5)
